titleStmt.title: SII 36.42: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 42. (A.R. No. 42 of 1910.) TIRUKKAḶĀVŪR (Tirukkarugāvūr), PAPANASAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Madhuvanēśvara temple.

summary.p: Incomplete. Gives a list of lands donated by various persons on different occasions and held by temples of Tirukkarugāvūr Mahādēva, Kāḷa Piḍāri and Mahāvishṇu at Tirukka[rugā]vūr, near Tirukkuḍamūkku (Kumbakōṇam), a dēvadāṉa of Vaḍakarai Pāmbūr-nāḍu. The income from these lands were utilized for several services and maintaining perpetual lamps in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraikoṇṭa kopparakecarippaṉma
kkiyāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu vaṭakarai pāmpūr nāṭṭu
tevatāṉam tirukuṭamūkkiṟpāl tiru
kkāvūr mahādevar nilamuṅ kāḷāpiṭāri
yār nilamum māviṣṇukaḷ nilamum
nallūr makapaṭṭaṉ Aṭṭiṉa kiṭakku 6 mā mukkāṇi
Aṟumā mukkāṇiyum putukkuḷatti
ṉ vaṭavāy kuṟakkuṭār Aṭṭiṉa Iraṇṭumā 1kāṇi ¿ 1mun=tiri 2m vaḻi
yummavaṉe Ārātippārkku tevar Iraṇṭu māvum
kuḻucey mukkāṇiyum cuṭṭallāṉa melai Eḻu māvilil
pākam mummāvaraiyil purāṇa caṅkkarkku nicati kuṟuṇi
yāka nīkki niṉṟa (1/2) pākamum cālāpokammākavum Aman
tuṭṭavai kāṇiyum Ālava kuḻi caṅka kañc cāttaṉ Aṭṭi
ṉa Araimāvum kuṟukkāṭṭiṉ melai Araimāvum A
ṇai vāri kālum paḷḷiceyil nāṉmāvum kucakkuṭinaṅkai
tiruviḷakkiṉukku Aṭṭiṉa Itaṅkīḻairaiyum vaṉayarputuku
ttiṉ kīḻai mukkāṇiyum vaḻiyum kucarkkuṭaṉ viḷakkiṉukku A
ṭṭiṉa kaṭuvāyiṉ mīy karai Iraṇṭumā 1kāṇi ¿yum Ārātippārk
ku paḷḷicceyil Iraṇṭumāvum kāḻakaṉ tuṭavai 1kāṇivum ki
ḻūrk kaṇavatiyār Avaṟṟuṭavai 1kāṇiyum Ālaṅkuḻiyi
ṉ teṉ vāy (1/4)(1/2)yum kaṭuvāyiṉ vaṭakarai veli
veṭṭatuṭavai 1kāṇi¿yum koṟṟaṅkuṭāṉ nākaṉ
kkaṉ Orumā 1kāṇi¿1mun=tiriyum paḻavāykkāliṉ vaṭavāykkuḻic
cey mukkāṇiyum pūtuṭavai Orumāvum veḷkāṭṭu mukkā
yum kāṭikaiy puṟam Orumā 1kāṇi 2m-rkuk nilam viḷaittum (1/2)iraṇṭumā
m kāḷāpaṭāriyār nilam cilakkaḷi 1kāṇi Araikkāl 2m pi vākkāliṉ
teṉkarai mukkāṇi Araikkāl mun=tiri 2m mayakkal mukkāṇi 2m ḻi mukkāṇi 2m Iraṇṭumā 1kāṇi mukkāṇi 2m
veṭṭak kuṭi vāykkāl karai Iraṇṭumā 2m Ālāñ vaṉ ṟeṟkil mayakkal
Digital edition of SII 36.42 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
